titleEn: Retrofit autonomy grows up: Planning software, sensor fusion and consolidation reshape the sector
titleZh: 改装自动驾驶走向成熟：规划软件、传感器融合与行业整合重塑农业机械领域
summaryZh: 本文分析了农业机械改装自动驾驶套件的最新发展趋势，指出该技术已从简单的转向辅助升级为集传感器、云连接和实时规划软件于一体的完整自动化平台。文章以AgXeed VCU及其TraXwise规划监控平台为例，展示了如何通过软件和传感器融合实现田间作业的全程自动化规划与调整。该技术对缓解农业劳动力短缺、优化机械投资和提升田间作业效率具有重要价值，尤其适用于大田作物生产场景。
featuredReason: 本文揭示了农业自动化从单一功能向集成平台演进的趋势，对智慧畜牧行业从业者理解跨领域技术整合、劳动力替代方案和精准作业管理具有重要参考价值。
contentFull: Retrofit autonomy grows up: Planning software, sensor fusion and consolidation reshape the sector 13-07 | Autonomous/semi-autosteering systems | ArticleLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrintBehind the VCU sits TraXwise, AgXeed’s own planning and monitoring platform, which lets a farmer or manager plan an entire working route in advance. Photo: AgXeedAutonomous retrofit kits have quietly shifted into a technology category that is reshaping how farms think about labour, machinery investment and field operations. It is turning into something closer to a full autonomy platform, layered with sensors, cloud connectivity, and software that plans, monitors and adjusts field work in real time. To highlight several new developments, the Future Farming Autonomous Retrofit Kits Catalogue has now been updated. A new addition is the AgXeed VCU, an autoLinkedInFacebookXWhatsAppPrint René Groeneveld Correspondent for AustraliaMore aboutAutonomous retrofit kitssoftwaretractor implement managementadLEARN MORERelated articles29-06 | NewsAgXeed’s VCU brings existing tractors into the autonomous fold27-05Nivavi presents autonomous retrofit kit system Bart14-05 | NewsClaas Xerion 12 series receives new updates for comfort, maintenance and autonomyPremium10-04-2025 | ArticleMarket developments and buying tips for autonomous retrofit kits Buyers guides & Catalogues Subscribe to our YouTube channel Taiwan Smart Agriweek 2026Sep 8-10, 2026 TaiNEX 1, Tapei
translationZh:
改装自动驾驶套件已悄然转变为一个技术类别，正在重塑农场对劳动力、机械投资和田间作业的思考方式。它正演变为更接近完整的自动化平台，集成了传感器、云连接以及能够实时规划、监控和调整田间作业的软件。为了突出几项新进展，《未来农业改装自动驾驶套件目录》现已更新。新增内容包括AgXeed VCU，这是一个自动

**改装自动驾驶走向成熟：规划软件、传感器融合与行业整合重塑该领域**

在VCU背后是AgXeed自己的规划与监控平台TraXwise，它允许农民或管理者提前规划整个作业路线。图片来源：AgXeed

author: René Groeneveld
contentHtml: Retrofit autonomy grows up: Planning software, sensor fusion and consolidation reshape the sector
